text: Drifting from the bright emptiness of a quiet modern hallway into this vibrant, surreal chamber of R+D, I sense an uncanny shift. The shimmering wall and soft glow invite a contemplative mood. Here, the boundary between observer and environment blurs; I feel at once exposed and hidden, entangled in a meditative dance between curiosity and reflection. This space hums with the potential of thought, as if it’s asking me to pause and notice—how strange it is to be both participant and spectator in the theater of innovation.
